mapper.insert: insert into deep_research_answer_projections ( run_id, answer_audit_id, projection_ordinal, anchor_id, citation_literal, source_type, target_key, status, repair_round, repaired_from_projection_ordinal ) values ( #{record.runId}, #{record.answerAuditId}, #{record.projectionOrdinal}, #{record.anchorId}, #{record.citationLiteral}, #{record.sourceType}, #{record.targetKey}, #{record.status}, #{record.repairRound}, #{record.repairedFromProjectionOrdinal} )
